**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is, in as much detail as possible. If possible please attach screenshots of any visual problems and either copy or screenshot the [browser console](https://c4e.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/14625450840731-Locating-Your-Browser-s-Developer-Console) for any technical issues.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.
